description: Patch the settings for a specific camera

children.name: isNameEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the name in the OSD.

children.name: isDateEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the date in the OSD.

children.name: isLogoEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the logo in the bottom right corner.

children.name: isDebugEnabled
children.description: Whether debug info is enabled.

children.name: overlayLocation
children.description: The location of the overlay on the screen.

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Indicates whether the status LED is enabled.

children.name: welcomeLed
children.description: Indicates whether the welcome LED is enabled.

children.name: floodLed
children.description: Indicates whether the flood LED is enabled.

requestBody.name: lcdMessage
requestBody.description: Message that's set on the LCD screen (for doorbells and/or other devices with LCD screens). To upload image assets for the LCD screen, use the `/files/{fileType}` endpoint.

children.name: resetAt
children.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

requestBody.name: videoMode
requestBody.description: Current video mode of the camera

requestBody.name: smartDetectSettings
requestBody.description: Smart detection settings for the camera.

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the camera

fields.name: mac
fields.description: The MAC address of the device

fields.name: isMicEnabled
fields.description: Whether or not the microphone on camera is enabled

children.name: isNameEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the name in the OSD.

children.name: isDateEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the date in the OSD.

children.name: isLogoEnabled
children.description: Whether to show the logo in the bottom right corner.

children.name: isDebugEnabled
children.description: Whether debug info is enabled.

children.name: overlayLocation
children.description: The location of the overlay on the screen.

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Indicates whether the status LED is enabled.

children.name: welcomeLed
children.description: Indicates whether the welcome LED is enabled.

children.name: floodLed
children.description: Indicates whether the flood LED is enabled.

children.name: resetAt
children.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

fields.name: videoMode
fields.description: Current video mode of the camera

children.name: supportFullHdSnapshot
children.description: Whether camera support full HD or higher resolution snapshot

children.name: hasHdr
children.description: Whether the camera supports High Dynamic Range mode

children.name: smartDetectTypes
children.description: What smart detection object types do the camera support.

children.name: smartDetectAudioTypes
children.description: What smart detection audio types do the camera support.

children.name: videoModes
children.description: A list of supported video modes by the camera

children.name: hasMic
children.description: Whether the camera has a microphone

children.name: hasLedStatus
children.description: Whether the camera has LED status

children.name: hasSpeaker
children.description: Whether the camera has a speaker to support talkback

fields.name: smartDetectSettings
fields.description: Smart detection settings for the camera.

local.ansible:
- name: Patch camera settings
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/cameras/{id}"
    method: PATCH
    body:
      name: string
      osdSettings:
        isNameEnabled: true
        isDateEnabled: true
        isLogoEnabled: true
        isDebugEnabled: true
        overlayLocation: topLeft
      ledSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        welcomeLed: true
        floodLed: true
      lcdMessage:
        type: string
      videoMode: default
      smartDetectSettings:
        objectTypes:
          - person
        audioTypes:
          - alrmSmoke
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.ansible:
- name: Patch camera settings
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/cameras/{id}"
    method: PATCH
    body:
      name: string
      osdSettings:
        isNameEnabled: true
        isDateEnabled: true
        isLogoEnabled: true
        isDebugEnabled: true
        overlayLocation: topLeft
      ledSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        welcomeLed: true
        floodLed: true
      lcdMessage:
        type: string
      videoMode: default
      smartDetectSettings:
        objectTypes:
          - person
        audioTypes:
          - alrmSmoke
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
